mlb.headline: Cubs slug 8 home runs and put up 23 runs in win over Padres
mlb.summary: Cubs slug 8 home runs and put up 23 runs in win over Padres

mlb.headline: Nationals take the series from the Red Sox with huge 10-2 win
mlb.summary: Nationals take the series from the Red Sox with huge 10-2 win

mlb.headline: Yankees' losing streak stretches to 7, longest since 2023, with 6-2, 11-inning defeat to Tigers
mlb.summary: — The New York Yankees’ losing streak stretched to seven, their longest in three years, as Camilo Doval forced in the go-ahead run with a bases-loaded walk to Spencer Torkelson in a four-run 11th inning that gave the Detroit Tigers a 6-2 victory...

mlb.headline: Tigers prevail in extras to sweep Yankees
mlb.summary: A four-run 11th inning gives the Tigers a 6-2 win over the Yankees.

mlb.headline: James Woods hits a 3-run homer as the Nationals beat the Red Sox 10-2 to take the series
mlb.summary: — James Woods belted a three-run homer for his 22nd of the season, Andrés Chaparro and Nasim Nuñez each hit their first and the Washington Nationals beat the Boston Red Sox 10-2 on Wednesday afternoon at steamy Fenway Park to take the series.

mlb.headline: Fantasy baseball lineup advice for Thursday: Grab Seymour if shopping for streamers
mlb.summary: Everything you need to know to set your fantasy baseball lineups for Thursday's MLB action.

nhl.headline: 2026 NHL free agency tracker: News, contracts, grades, buzz
nhl.summary: Get up to speed on all the latest veteran additions teams are making beginning on June 30.

nhl.headline: NHL free agency 2026: Which players improved their fantasy hockey potential?
nhl.summary: What are the fantasy hockey implications of every big move in the NHL this offseason? Find out here.

nhl.headline: Sources: Rangers set to trade Vincent Trocheck to Mammoth
nhl.summary: The New York Rangers are finalizing a deal to send forward Vincent Trocheck to the Utah Mammoth, sources told ESPN's Emily Kaplan Wednesday, giving the 32-year-old veteran a new start in the Western Conference with three seasons remaining on his cont

nhl.headline: NHL free agency 2026: Grades, fits for all the big signings
nhl.summary: With free agency underway, we're handing out marks for all of the big deals around the league.

nhl.headline: Capitals sign Boone Jenner, Vincent Desharnais to 4-year deals
nhl.summary: The Capitals have signed center Boone Jenner to a four-year, $23 million contract and defenseman Vincent Desharnais to a four-year, $16.8 million deal.

nhl.headline: Oilers trim payroll, send defenseman Darnell Nurse to Sharks
nhl.summary: The Edmonton Oilers are trading veteran defenseman Darnell Nurse, 31, who is entering the fifth season of an eight-year contract that pays him $9.25 million annually, to the San Jose Sharks, sources told ESPN's Emily Kaplan on Wednesday afternoon.

nba.headline: 2026 NBA free agency: Grades for offseason signings, extensions
nba.summary: We're grading the biggest free agent signings and extensions, including the Quentin Grimes and Sandro Mamukelashvili deals in Los Angeles.

nba.headline: 2026 NBA buzz: Latest free agency and trade updates
nba.summary: We're tracking deals, trades and buzz across the NBA, including new teams for Tobias Harris, Kelly Oubre Jr. and Norman Powell -- plus the latest on LeBron.

nba.headline: Sources: Spurs land 2-year, $31M deal with Tobias Harris
nba.summary: Tobias Harris is taking his veteran presence to the Spurs after helping lead the Pistons' turnaround, sources told ESPN.

nba.headline: LeBron James free agency: Pros and cons of potential destinations
nba.summary: With LeBron James leaving Los Angeles, we look at the pros and cons of possible landing spots for his 24th season, including the Cavs and Warriors.

nba.headline: Pacers, Kelly Oubre Jr. agree to two-year deal, sources say
nba.summary: After a three-season run with the 76ers, free agent forward Kelly Oubre Jr. has agreed to a two-year, nearly $17 million deal to sign with the Pacers, sources told ESPN.

nba.headline: Fantasy basketball: Walker Kessler provides value as Luka's big man running mate
nba.summary: Andre Snellings and Eric Moody break down the fantasy impact of the latest offseason moves from around the NBA.

wnba.headline: Collier back at practice, looks to boost red-hot Miles, Lynx
wnba.summary: Minnesota Lynx star Napheesa Collier has returned to team practice and activities, keeping her recovery progression from surgeries on both ankles on track as expected.

wnba.headline: WNBA All-Star 2026 starters predictions: Clark, Wilson, more
wnba.summary: The 2026 WNBA All-Star Game will be played in Chicago on July 25. These players should be on the court at tip-off.

wnba.headline: Seattle visits Phoenix after Johnson's 24-point game
